concerns.detail: Names a specific PhD student (jagengmao/jiageng mao) who is not a public figure, violating privacy of students
Names a specific private individual (王兴兴) who appears to be a student or non-public figure targeted by a professor's social media post
Uses gendered slur '学术妲己' (implying sexual manipulation for academic advancement) which is an unsupported character judgment rather than criticism of advising practices
Uses profanity and gendered insults (婊, 贱, bitch) constituting pure personal attacks
